message:
feat(bench): add load balancer benchmark harness

Register new load_balancer_benchmark in Cargo.toml as a harness=false
benchmark target and add the initial benchmark implementation in
benches/load_balancer_benchmark.rs.

This enables targeted performance regression testing for the load
balancing subsystem, measuring weighted round-robin distribution,
connection routing latency, and rebalancing overhead.

Run with: cargo bench --bench load_balancer_benchmark

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -249,6 +249,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "methodology_baselines"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "load_balancer_benchmark"
+harness = false
+
 [profile.release]
 opt-level = 3
 lto = "fat"
